title: Garlic Grilled Jamaican Taleggio Bowl
description: A rich, shaggy Jamaican inspired dish featuring melty Taleggio cheese, served atop a bed of blanched greens. This satvik-friendly meal is perfect for meal prep and can be grilled to perfection on a robata grill.

ingredients.name: Blanched kale
ingredients.notes: massage before serving for tender leaves

instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together crushed tomatoes, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Grill Taleggio cheese for 2-3 minutes per side, until melted and slightly charred.
Meanwhile, brush the grill with olive oil and add sliced jalapeño and red onion.
Grill for 2-3 minutes, until slightly charred.
Add the blanched kale to the grill and massage with your hands until it reaches your desired level of tenderness.
To assemble the bowls, place a grilled Taleggio slice on top of a bed of kale, followed by a spoonful of the tomato mixture.
Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used up.
Garnish with additional sliced jalapeño and red onion, if desired.
